response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web engineer with strong testing discipline and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments, but the role requires native Japanese proficiency (not indicated), deep C for UNIX embedded development, Linux kernel modification experience, and switch/networking security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3) — none of which appear in the resume. The mismatch on hard requirements is severe.
strengths: Brief C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing discipline
Broad polyglot background across systems, web, and embedded-adjacent work
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience
No networking-security domain expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switches)

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and testing discipline
